metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_715
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig. 1; IL-1RAcP induces presynaptic differentiation when expressed in HEK293T co-cultured with cortical neurons.
Literal:
"HEK293T cells were transfected with EGFP and respective IL-1R family proteins tagged with FLAG epitope at the N terminus and were seeded on the top of cultured cortical neurons."we detected robust staining signals for Bassoon on the axons in contact with HEK293T cells expressing FLAG-IL-1RAcP

Fig.2 Beads with Fc-fused IL-1RAcP ECD induce presynaptic differentiation in co-cultured neurons

Fig. 3d,e,f ; siRNA-mediated knockdown of IL-1RAcP isoforms in cortical neurons reduced the staining signals for presynaptic Bassoon and decreased the number of dendritic spines.
Literal:
"The siRNA against Il1rap was transfected into cultured cortical neurons at DIV 10. After 4d of incubation, we observed a significant reduction of staining signals
for presynaptic Bassoon along the dendrites of the transfected cortical neurons and a decrease of number of dendritic protrusions (Fig. 3D-F)"

Fig. 4a,b; transfected FLAG-IL-1RAcP in cortical neurons increased punctate immunostaining signals for Bassoon
Literal:
"Transfection of cultured cortical neurons at DIV 12 with the expression vector for FLAG-IL-1RAcP increased punctate immunostaining signals for Bassoon but exerted little effect on dendritic protrusions (Fig. 4)

Fig.8 IL-1RAcPb and IL-1RAcP (not shown) requires PTPδ for presynaptic differentiation. Experimental description: Fig. 1; Fig. 3d,e; Fig. 4a,b. Mouse IL-1RAcP is overexpressed HEK293T cells co-cultured with mouse cortical neurons and transfecetd in mouse cortical neurons
Literal from M&M
- Overexpressed 1RAcP is of mouse species: "The entire coding sequences of mouse IL-1RAcP, IL-1RAcPb, ..."
"Cell cultures, transfection, and coculture assay. Primary cortical cultures were prepared from mice at postnatal day 0 (P0) essentially as described previously"
